summary: Phase 2 backend + frontend testing for MULTIPLIKATOR TrainingPlus restructure. Backend: 31/31 pytest assertions PASSED — catalog includes all new VIP sublevels (vip_a1_1..vip_c1_2), corrected VIP fulls (vip_b2=250K, vip_c1=280K), all 9 new bundle IDs with exact discounted amounts, kids_english (15K) + kids_english_reg (2.5K). Every new ID produces a valid Stripe checkout session (https://checkout.stripe.com/...). Legacy bundle_a1_a2_b1 alias kept. vip_c2_1 correctly rejected with 400. Frontend: /departements/training-plus shows the new H2 'Cours d'allemand · Semi-Intensif' as the FIRST section H2, all 12 semi sublevel cards A1.1→C2.2, all 24 expected dot-formatted prices (46.000, 50.000, 60.000, 67.500, 92.000, 100.000, 120.000, 135.000, 200.000, 215.000, 250.000, 280.000, 107.500, 125.000, 140.000, 172.800, 198.000, 229.500, 265.200, 379.950, 511.700, 301.750, 433.500, 348.500), 9 bundles with correct titles and 'Best value' badge on bundle_a1_b1, 18 'Acheter ce cours' + 7 'Demander un devis' buttons, 3 'Découvrir' CTAs (no 'Me notifier'), MPK Exam Prep callout positioned AFTER language nav cards (idx 352524 > 343883). Language pages /langues/anglais (Kids English card 15.000 FCFA, 2.500 FCFA registration, 1 mois, all 12 sublevels), /langues/francais (FLE H1, En cours de conception placeholders), /langues/chinois (Cours de Chinois H1, placeholders) all render correctly with working back links. i18n verified: FR='Cours d'allemand · Semi-Intensif', EN='German Courses · Semi-Intensive', DE='Deutschkurse · Semi-Intensiv'; languages.discover keys present (Découvrir/Discover/Entdecken).

issues: VIP section H2 reads 'Premium VIP Accéléré · Deutsch' — 'Accéléré' (FR) is not translated to 'Beschleunigt'/'Schnell-Track'. Not in the scope of this iteration's required keys but worth flagging.

backend_validation.catalog_endpoint: /api/catalog returns 200, list of all expected IDs (new VIP sublevels, 9 bundles, kids_english, vip_b2=250K, vip_c1=280K).
backend_validation.stripe_checkout_results: 9/9 bundles + 10/10 VIP sublevels + vip_b2 + vip_c1 + kids_english + kids_english_reg all return 200 with valid checkout.stripe.com URLs.
backend_validation.unknown_package_rejection: vip_c2_1 correctly returns 400 (not in catalog — quote-only).

trainingplus_h2_order: Packs multi-niveaux — économisez en vous projetant.
Goethe-Zertifikat & ÖSD — voir MPK Exam Prep.
Un conseiller MPK vous guide vers le bon parcours.
frontend_validation.bundle_titles_found: 9/9 (Pack A1+A2, Pack A2+B1, Pack B1+B2, Parcours A1→B1, A1→B2, A1→C1, A2→B2, A2→C1, B1→C1)
frontend_validation.language_english_page: H1 'Cours d'anglais' OK; Kids English Training card with 15.000 FCFA + 2.500 FCFA registration + 1 mois OK; 12 sublevel cards A1.1-C2.2 with 'Bientôt disponible' badge; back link OK.
frontend_validation.language_french_page: H1 'Cours de Français (FLE)' OK; 12 sublevels with 'En cours de conception' placeholders; back link OK.
frontend_validation.language_chinese_page: H1 'Cours de Chinois' OK; 12 sublevels with 'En cours de conception' placeholders; back link OK.
frontend_validation.price_formatting: All prices use dot separator (de-DE locale): 46.000, 100.000, 172.800, 511.700, etc. — no leaks.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Translate 'Accéléré' → 'Schnell-Track'/'Beschleunigt' in DE locale for vip_section_title (currently reads 'Premium VIP Accéléré · Deutsch').
critical_code_review_comments: TrainingPlus.jsx is now likely 700+ lines with BundleCard, VipSublevelCard, CourseProductCard, LangNavCard inline. Consider extracting these subcomponents to /components for reusability and to keep page file under the 700-line guideline.
Bundle 'tone' colours are hardcoded hex strings in data.js — consider mapping to a shared design-token file (e.g., theme.bordeaux) to keep palette centralised.
Backend CATALOG is a 70-line in-memory dict — fine for now, but adding price changes will require code redeploys. Long-term consider moving prices to MongoDB so admin/CMS can edit.
VIP_INTENSIVE constant in data.js duplicates VIP_FULL B2/C1 — kept for backward compat but should be deleted in a follow-up cleanup PR (DRY).
Backend test file added at /app/backend/tests/test_phase2_catalog_stripe.py — covers catalog + checkout regression. Keep alongside existing backend_test.py.
test_credentials: Admin admin@multiplikator.bj / Multiplikator2026! (not used this iteration; auth not in scope).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 verified end-to-end. Backend catalog has 9 new bundles + 10 new VIP sublevels + corrected vip_b2/vip_c1 + kids_english(_reg). Frontend TrainingPlus has 6 H2 sections in this order: German Semi-Intensif sublevels → German full levels → VIP sublevels → Bundles → Language nav cards (EN/FR/CN cards with 'Découvrir' CTA) → Exam Prep callout → CTA. Stripe XOF /100 division still active and correct. Legacy bundle_a1_a2_b1 alias retained. Note: vip_c2_1/vip_c2_2 are intentionally NOT in catalog (quote-only). Minor: DE locale still shows 'Accéléré' in VIP section H2 — non-blocking.
